ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research contribution */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who made the contribution */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research work */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the research was published */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of research (e.g., article, conference paper) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the research contribution */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the research contribution */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal or conference where the research was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "page_range" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Information about the funding sources for the research */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the research for better categorization and search */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the research (e.g., Published, In Review, Draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_contributions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the researcher */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation criterion (e.g., Originality, Impact) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the criterion in the overall evaluation */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale used for rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research contribution being rated */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation criterion used */,
  "rating_value" TEXT /* Rating value (e.g., Poor, Competent, Good, Excellent) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the evaluator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "reviewer_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the reviewer, providing context for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_ratings_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_ratings_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES research_contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research contribution */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations received by the contribution */,
  "publication_rate" REAL /* Rate of publication for the researcher */,
  "altmetric_score" INTEGER /* Altmetric score, which measures the online attention and impact of the research */,
  "google_scholar_citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations from Google Scholar */,
  "cited_by" TEXT /* List of papers or researchers who have cited this work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citation_metrics_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES research_contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research contribution */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator providing feedback */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the evaluator */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Overall rating provided by the evaluator */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES research_contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the evaluator belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications and expertise of the evaluator */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluators_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty" TEXT /* Faculty associated with the department */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_contributions" INTEGER /* Total number of contributions assessed */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating across all assessed contributions */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID to which the report is specific */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Researcher ID to which the report is specific */,
  "contribution_ids" TEXT /* List of contribution IDs included in the report */,
  "total_citations" INTEGER /* Total number of citations across all contributions */,
  "total_publications" INTEGER /* Total number of publications by the researcher or department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Researcher, Evaluator, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
